_comment: Administrative-name standardization. Keys are lowercased/trimmed raw values as they appear in Kobo or ZiteManager; values are the single official spelling used everywhere in the dashboard. Applied server-side in api/lib/transformations.py and zite_transform.py so filters, KPIs, charts, tables, maps and exports all receive one canonical value. Only add a mapping once the merge has been reviewed — do not merge two genuinely different locations.
